payload.recommended_action: Hold advisory recommendation until required preconditions and review items are cleared.
blocked_reasons: A contact or recovery route is outside the approved advisory route catalog or carries direct execution semantics.
A domain legal-source fact is draft, legacy, placeholder, unknown, or otherwise not approved_static_v1.
A selected route references an unknown, placeholder, legacy, or non-approved legal source.
Claim balance, payment allocation, or claimed recovery amount is ambiguous, disputed, or excessive.
Claim target, property, or priority material indicates exemption review is required.
Execution clause proof is absent or not source-backed.
Insolvency, discharge, rehabilitation, stay, or credit-recovery material requires legal review.
Limitation, interruption, or stale-claim risk is not cleared by source-backed evidence.
No source-backed enforceable title document type is present.
Service, finality, or execution-clause proof is incomplete for domain-v1 advisory route review.
Welfare, public-benefit, or protected-benefit material requires protected-property review.
